sentaurus.removeEnvironmentVariables: Sentaurus: Search and Remove Environment Variables
config.definitionMaxWidth.description: Max characters per line in user-defined variable/function hover. Set to 0 to disable truncation.
config.RW.mdDesc:
Prefix for **Refinement Evaluation Window**.

Affects:
- `Doping > Const-box` → `sdedr:define-refeval-window`
- `Doping > Gauss` → `sdedr:define-refeval-window`
- `Doping > Submesh` → `sdedr:define-refeval-window`
- `Meshing > Ref-box` → `sdedr:define-refeval-window`
config.DC.mdDesc:
Prefix for **Doping Constant profile**.

Affects:
- `Doping > Const-box` → `sdedr:define-constant-profile`
- `Doping > Const-material` → `sdedr:define-constant-profile`
- `Doping > Const-region` → `sdedr:define-constant-profile`
config.CPP.mdDesc:
Prefix for **Constant Profile Placement**.

Affects:
- `Doping > Const-box` → `sdedr:define-constant-profile-placement`
config.CPM.desc: Prefix for Constant Profile Material/Region placement.
config.CPM.mdDesc:
Prefix for **Constant Profile Material/Region placement**.

Affects:
- `Doping > Const-material` → `sdedr:define-constant-profile-material`
- `Doping > Const-region` → `sdedr:define-constant-profile-region`
config.GAUSS.mdDesc:
Prefix for **Gaussian analytic profile**.

Affects:
- `Doping > Gauss` → `sdedr:define-gaussian-profile`
config.IMP.mdDesc:
Prefix for **Analytical (Implant) profile placement**.

Affects:
- `Doping > Gauss` → `sdedr:define-analytical-profile-placement`
config.RS.mdDesc:
Prefix for **Refinement Size specification**.

Affects:
- `Meshing > Ref-box` → `sdedr:define-refinement-size`
- `Meshing > Ref-material` → `sdedr:define-refinement-size`
- `Meshing > Ref-region` → `sdedr:define-refinement-size`
config.RP.mdDesc:
Prefix for **Refinement Placement**.

Affects:
- `Meshing > Ref-box` → `sdedr:define-refinement-placement`
- `Meshing > Ref-material` → `sdedr:define-refinement-material`
- `Meshing > Ref-region` → `sdedr:define-refinement-region`
config.envVars.mdDesc:
SWB pre-injected environment variable whitelist. Key = variable name, value = hover doc (leave empty for name-only). Changes take effect immediately.

[Add Environment Variables](command:sentaurus.addEnvironmentVariables) | [Search & Remove](command:sentaurus.removeEnvironmentVariables) | [Export](command:sentaurus.exportEnvironmentVariables) | [Import](command:sentaurus.importEnvironmentVariables)
semanticToken.sectionName: SDEVICE top-level section name (e.g. File, Plot)
semanticToken.subSection: SDEVICE Solve sub-section name (e.g. Quasistationary, Coupled, Transient)
config.materialDbPath.description: Path to MaterialDB directory containing .par files. Leave empty to use built-in placeholder data.
config.materialDbPath.mdDesc:
Absolute path to a **MaterialDB directory** containing `.par` files.

When set, all direct child `.par` files in this directory are parsed and their parameters become available in completions (tagged as `materialdb` source).

When empty or invalid, a built-in placeholder dataset is used. The full built-in MaterialDB will be populated in a future update.

**Priority:** `materialdb` source has lower priority than `current` / `include` / `workspace`.
statusBar.ready.missed: PAR index ready — trigger completion again for workspace symbols
